overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese village at night during winter. The scene features snow-covered ground, warm paper lanterns illuminating wooden buildings, and a deep blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with traditional wooden houses and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow village path between traditional wooden buildings with snow-covered roofs

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden building with tiled roof and warm interior lighting
low stone wall running alongside the path
illuminated traditional paper lantern casting warm orange light
tall pine tree silhouetted against the night sky
wooden fence lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, snow-dusted village street lined with traditional wooden houses and stone walls. Warm paper lanterns cast a golden glow against the cool blue night, while tall pine trees rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with wooden bridges and scattered trees

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the starry night sky and tall pine trees
a seated villager becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden bridges and walking through a more open village area with visible sky and autumn foliage

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the ground near a traditional building

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge crossing a small stream or depression
tree with red and orange autumn foliage
deep blue night sky with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character crosses wooden bridges surrounded by autumn trees. The camera tilts up to reveal the starry night sky, and a seated villager appears on the right side near a traditional building.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path approaching stone steps with autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the village path with autumn trees on either side, approaching a set of stone steps

entered.detail: stone steps leading upward to a higher level of the village
stone wall reappearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path lined with autumn trees showing red and orange leaves, approaching a set of stone steps leading upward. Traditional wooden houses continue to line both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square at top of stone steps

events.description: group of standing villagers comes into view at the top of the steps
character reaches the top of the steps and continues into the open square

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps and passing through a group of villagers into an open village square

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and conversing at the top of the stone steps

entered.detail: large boulder or rock formation beside the steps
open paved area with multiple buildings visible in the distance
dense grove of bamboo trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone steps where a group of villagers stands at the top. Upon reaching the summit, the scene opens into a wider village square with more traditional buildings and a bamboo grove visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet, snow-dusted village that gradually opens into a wider communal square. It begins in a narrow street lined with wooden houses and stone walls, where warm paper lanterns cast a golden glow against the cool blue night. As the character moves forward, the path expands across wooden bridges surrounded by autumn trees, with the camera tilting upward to reveal a starry sky before passing a seated villager. The scene then shifts along a dirt path framed by red and orange foliage, leading the character toward a set of ascending stone steps. Finally, the camera follows the ascent past a group of villagers to reveal a broad village square featuring traditional buildings and a distant bamboo grove.
